hero.badge: Fastest iPhone repair service in Egypt
hero.title1: Broken iPhone? We come to you
hero.title2: and  fix  it  in  just  30  minutes!!
hero.description: Whatever your iPhone's problem, we come to your location and fix it in front of you using original parts and latest tools, with a 3-month warranty.

services.title: What's the problem?
services.description: We specialize in repairing all iPhone models with the latest technologies and original spare parts.

screen.title: Screen Issues
screen.desc: Screen broken or cracked? We change it at your location with the highest quality.

battery.title: Battery Issues
battery.desc: Battery draining fast? We replace it with a real warranty and excellent performance.

back.title: Back Glass Issues
back.desc: Back glass broken? We replace it with laser technology, and it looks brand new.

camera.title: Camera Issues
camera.desc: Camera not working or blurry? We fix it and it will take great photos again.

motherboard.title: Motherboard Issues
motherboard.desc: Phone not turning on or short circuit? Our experts fix the most complex board issues.

process.title: Simple steps for a new phone

step1.title: Contact Us
step1.desc: Call us or WhatsApp and explain your phone's problem.

step2.title: We Come to You
step2.desc: A specialized technician comes to your home or office as soon as possible.

step3.title: Instant Repair
step3.desc: We fix the fault in front of you in less than 30 minutes with high precision.

step4.title: Real Warranty
step4.desc: You receive your phone working perfectly with a one-year warranty on maintenance.

about.title: Focus Store
about.description1: In iPhone repair, experience is the real difference. At FOCUS, we have over 12 years of specialized experience in repairing iPhones. Over these years, we have gained the trust of thousands of customers after restoring their devices to peak performance. Our commitment to quality, precision, and speed is what makes our name grow day by day.
about.description2: Our passion for repair makes us always enjoy discovering new problems and faults, even if they are complex, which keeps us ahead in iPhone repair. Our customers always trust us for the quality and professionalism we provide.

item1.title: Repair at Your Location
item1.desc: No need to leave your phone and go; we fix it in front of you at your home or office.

item2.title: Original Spare Parts
item2.desc: We use the highest quality spare parts to ensure your phone's original performance.

item3.title: Real Warranty
item3.desc: Every maintenance operation provided by Focus Store comes with a real and effective warranty.

item4.title: Super Fast
item4.desc: We complete most maintenance operations in less than 30 minutes.

slider.title: Quality We Trust, Results You Can See
slider.description: Our services are characterized by precision and professionalism. We care about the smallest details to ensure customer satisfaction and restore your devices to their original state.

contact.title: We'd Love to Hear from You
